text.p: Beloved sister,

How are you and the family? How was your easter break and the places you visited. Thanks so much for the card. Our retreat was wonderful, timely and very refreshing. Though the week following has been quiet challenging but we bless the the Lord for everything. He is the sovereign Lord and the Father of all.
I saw your message on my computer sometime last week. I wasn't in the office, by the time I came back you had logged off. Sorry for that.
Express my greetings to every body and have a blessed week.
Big bigger Ore,
Thanks to God your journey was smooth. I am happy to know the children are fine and daddy too. What a re-union! Thank God for His faithfulness.
We sincerely appreciate your kind gesture in giving us your apartment at this time leaving us with the facilities to enjoy. May the good Lord graciously reward you for your love.

We moved into your house last Friday and we are gradually settling down. The children also resumed at the Staff sch. yesterday. I was very busy yesterday with all the placement procedure, books purchase, etc that I could not check my mail early enough to reply you.
I was happy reading through your mail yesterday. You should be speaking German by now.
I hope you have relaxed well.
Sis called asking me to send the acct no for payment. We wl settle that soon but mind you the thing I bought were just N4,400=.
The Stress management talk was educative. My husband will soon send you the e-copy.

WWF meeting will hold this Friday. I begged to have it postponed 'cos of the packing since no other weekend would be ok for my husband and I. We are discussing the topic: "Sexual intimacy: challenges and solutions". We will keep you posted on tips we find helpful (I hope daddy is not reading this mail with you- you wl surelyneed it there.)
Oh! I have to leave for Church now. I will respond to other issues tomorrow.
Miss you ma
My dear sister,
I am sorry it took me this long to reply. Many many reasons. I am sorry I have not even called. I will please bear with me.
Your daughters came back to on the 12th of this month. They are fine and have acclamatised back. They resumed school on the 15th.

Thank God you enjoyed the first service, it really helps one. I do not know how God does it but there is almost fulness of joy in His presence. I know He will continue to take perfect care of you all.
How are my boys now? Have they started school? How is brother? How are you doing? We miss you dearly over here.
I am still trusting God concerning the postdoc offer. I agree He is faithful.
Have a nice weekend ma, I will keep in touch.
Remain blessed,
My Sister,

Good day Ma. How are you and everybody? Hope you are fast adjusting to the condition of things over there. What of the children's school? I believe it is well with you all in Jesus name. Mrs sent a text that She has paid the 600,000N in your account at Bank. We will await further directive from you. I know my uncle is taking good care of you. And you are taking good care of him too. Special greetings to the boys.

i belv u a setling down God will kp u strong & prosperous in d land my love to my sons & yr husband. We pd 600,000 in to yr bank acct on fri 26 .Pls can insruct that d car & d papers be releasd to us my hus wants tyo work on it & take it to by wed 2nd oct. thk uu we apre u
Good Morning, Sis

How was yesterday service? my computer was infested with virus and had to be formated, it was returned on thursday. We were at your site upper sunday, it needs weeding and we've not seen the person you said will be cutting the grass. It has been a little stressful with some of my staff on leave and sick off, i've also had to travel for workshops from the office, the hostel project too has it's own toilon finances but in all things, God has been sufficient. It has been laid on my heart to exhort you that God has ordain the place and time of our habitation. You are not where you are by chance God knew it long ago and allowed it; He is everywhere for us to reach out for Him though He's not far from us. Acts 17:26-27. Have you been employed? RELAX GOD IS IN
